arts.sum: Benfica claimed their first win of the Club World Cup with a resounding 6-0 win over Group C whipping boys Auckland City to leave them on four points from the opening two matches. Bayern Munich made ...

arts.ttl: Will Muller play? How Bayern could line up on Tuesday against Benfica
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Bayern Munich could line up for their Club World Cup clash against Benfica on Tuesday.
